testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message:
Error { message='Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[text()='Forgotten Password']") resolved to 2 elements: 1) <a href="https://tutorialsninja.com/demo/index.php?route=account/forgotten">Forgotten Password</a> aka locator("#content").getByRole(AriaRole.LINK, new Locator.GetByRoleOptions().setName("Forgotten Password")) 2) <a class="list-group-item" href="https://tutorialsninja.com/demo/index.php?route=account/forgotten">Forgotten Password</a> aka locator("#column-right").getByRole(AriaRole.LINK, new Locator.GetByRoleOptions().setName("Forgotten Password"))
name='Error stack='Error: Error: strict mode violation: locator("//a[text()='Forgotten Password']") resolved to 2 elements: 1) <a href="https://tutorialsninja.com/demo/index.php?route=account/forgotten">Forgotten Password</a> aka locator("#content").getByRole(AriaRole.LINK, new Locator.GetByRoleOptions().setName("Forgotten Password")) 2) <a class="list-group-item" href="https://tutorialsninja.com/demo/index.php?route=account/forgotten">Forgotten Password</a> aka locator("#column-right").getByRole(AriaRole.LINK, new Locator.GetByRoleOptions().setName("Forgotten Password"))
at CRExecutionContext.evaluateWithArguments (C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\server\chromium\crExecutionContext.js:92:33) at async LongStandingScope._race (C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\utils\manualPromise.js:96:14) at async evaluateExpression (C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\server\javascript.js:235:12) at async C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\server\frames.js:959:22 at async Frame.retryWithProgressAndTimeouts (C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\server\frames.js:929:24) at async C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\server\frames.js:1014:29 at async ProgressController.run (C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\server\progress.js:82:22) at async FrameDispatcher.click (C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\server\dispatchers\frameDispatcher.js:157:12) at async LongStandingScope._race (C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\utils\manualPromise.js:96:14) at async FrameDispatcher._handleCommand (C:\Users\Nikhil\AppData\Local\Temp\playwright-java-9972459129400979915\package\lib\server\dispatchers\dispatcher.js:96:14) } Call log: - waiting for locator("//a[text()='Forgotten Password']")
